message:
feat(cli/vfs): expand CLI frontend and add VFS/harness improvements

Concurrent agent contributions:

- fsqlite-cli/main.rs (+417 lines): substantial CLI expansion with
  command parsing, database open/attach, query execution, output
  formatting, and interactive mode scaffolding
- fsqlite-vfs/unix.rs (+25 lines): extend POSIX VFS with additional
  file operation methods
- harness UI test: add sealed_mvcc_pager_impl_fail.stderr compile-fail
  expected output for UI test suite
- beads: sync issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,16 @@ note: required by a bound in `MvccPager`
              fsqlite_pager::MockTransaction
              fsqlite_pager::MockCheckpointPageWriter
 
+error[E0046]: not all trait items implemented, missing: `journal_mode`, `set_journal_mode`, `set_wal_backend`
+ --> tests/ui/sealed_mvcc_pager_impl_fail.rs:7:1
+  |
+7 | impl MvccPager for ExternalPager {
+  | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ missing `journal_mode`, `set_journal_mode`, `set_wal_backend` in implementation
+  |
+  = help: implement the missing item: `fn journal_mode(&self) -> fsqlite_pager::JournalMode { todo!() }`
+  = help: implement the missing item: `fn set_journal_mode(&self, _: &Cx, _: fsqlite_pager::JournalMode) -> Result<fsqlite_pager::JournalMode, FrankenError> { todo!() }`
+  = help: implement the missing item: `fn set_wal_backend(&self, _: Box<(dyn WalBackend + 'static)>) -> Result<(), FrankenError> { todo!() }`
+
 error[E0277]: the trait bound `ExternalPager: traits::sealed::Sealed` is not satisfied
  --> tests/ui/sealed_mvcc_pager_impl_fail.rs:7:20
   |
